title: Cloudflare Queue Consumer
description: A consumer configuration for a Cloudflare Queue, either a Worker push consumer or an HTTP pull consumer.

oneOf.title: Worker Consumer
oneOf.description: A Cloudflare Worker-based push consumer that receives messages automatically.

script_name.description: Name of the Cloudflare Worker script that will consume messages.

dead_letter_queue.description: Name of the dead letter queue to send failed messages to.

batch_size.description: Maximum number of messages per batch.

max_concurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent consumer invocations.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of retries for failed messages.

max_wait_time_ms.description: Milliseconds to wait for a batch to fill before delivery.

retry_delay.description: Seconds to delay before retrying a failed message.

oneOf.title: HTTP Pull Consumer
oneOf.description: An HTTP-based pull consumer that polls for messages via the REST API.

dead_letter_queue.description: Name of the dead letter queue to send failed messages to.

batch_size.description: Maximum number of messages per pull batch.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of retries for failed messages.

retry_delay.description: Seconds to delay before retrying a failed message.

visibility_timeout_ms.description: Milliseconds a pulled message is exclusively leased before becoming available again.
